unsubscribe.title: Manage your email preferences
unsubscribe.description: Customize which communications you'd like to receive from MirrorBuddy
unsubscribe.invalidTokenDescription: The link you used is invalid or has expired. If you need help, contact us.
unsubscribe.successMessage: Your email preferences have been updated successfully
unsubscribe.errorMessage: We couldn't save your preferences. Please try again later.

footer.privacy: We respect your privacy and your data under GDPR.
footer.resubscribe: You can change these preferences at any time using the link in our emails.
